programmes.show_description: Blimey, what a year! Get ready to turn your telly up LOUD, with the greatest party anthems from '71 including T.Rex, Slade, New Seekers, Badfinger, Deep Purple and Benny Hill.
60 solid hours of hips-don't-lie, glitter-won't-quit, disco-ball-spinning party brilliance. Basically, if it wiggles - it's in!
The year that set the musical agenda for the whole of the next decade. 20 scene-setters with songs for every taste, whether you like The Beatles, The Stones or the Archies!
60 solid hours of hips-don't-lie, glitter-won't-quit, disco-ball-spinning party brilliance. Basically, if it wiggles - it's in!
Blimey, what a year! Get ready to turn your telly up LOUD, with the greatest party anthems from '74 including glam rock stars The Sweet, Slade and Alvin Stardust.
60 solid hours of hips-don't-lie, glitter-won't-quit, disco-ball-spinning party brilliance. Basically, if it wiggles - it's in!
The ever-smooth Simes dusts off his flares, fires up the lava lamp & takes you on a psychedelic spin through the 70s. Side effects may include sudden urges to perm your hair!
60 solid hours of hips-don't-lie, glitter-won't-quit, disco-ball-spinning party brilliance. Basically, if it wiggles - it's in!
A 30 minute battle of the mid-seventies rock n roll sex gods!
60 solid hours of hips-don't-lie, glitter-won't-quit, disco-ball-spinning party brilliance. Basically, if it wiggles - it's in!
Big singalong choruses and outrageous outfits & make-up - these were the guys & gals that set the style of the 70s - and our man with the musical plan Tony Blackburn was there!
60 solid hours of hips-don't-lie, glitter-won't-quit, disco-ball-spinning party brilliance. Basically, if it wiggles - it's in!
Blimey, what a year! Get ready to turn your telly up LOUD, with the greatest party anthems from 1970 including The Jackson Five, Mungo Jerry, Black Sabbath, Free & Elvis Presley.
60 solid hours of hips-don't-lie, glitter-won't-quit, disco-ball-spinning party brilliance. Basically, if it wiggles - it's in!
Every song comes from that vintage year when the sun shone all summer & Dave's band Showaddywaddy had their big number 1. Queen, Leo Sayer, Abba & Smokie also kept the hits coming.

60 solid hours of hips-don't-lie, glitter-won't-quit, disco-ball-spinning party brilliance. Basically, if it wiggles - it's in!
From the early days when soul gained that disco beat in 1973, to the turn of the decade when Blondie and Diana Ross got in on the act! Simon Bates is your dancefloor host!
60 solid hours of hips-don't-lie, glitter-won't-quit, disco-ball-spinning party brilliance. Basically, if it wiggles - it's in!
Blimey, what a year! Get ready to turn your telly up loud, with the greatest party anthems from '77 including Showaddywaddy, David Bowie, Boney M and The Sex Pistols.

The voice of your childhood Derek Griffiths with 40 of those tunes you pestered your parents to buy - all top pop moments that still bring a smile & happy memories of school days!

In year order - the 70 biggest party tunes of the 70s! Every one of them a chart topper.

Blackburn's your man for the ultimate early 70s party playlist. How about some pure pop cheese from big names and forgotten acts that'll have you singing your head off? Let's bop!

In order - five hours of the biggest karaoke anthems of the 70s - from Mungo Jerry and T.Rex to Abba, Blondie and Queen. Prepare to sing out loud!
